mapper.select: select id as id, consultation_no as consultationNo, owner_id as ownerId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, title as title, content as content, images as images, status as status, rating as rating, rating_comment as ratingComment, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from consultation where id = #{id}

select id as id, consultation_no as consultationNo, owner_id as ownerId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, title as title, content as content, images as images, status as status, rating as rating, rating_comment as ratingComment, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from consultation order by id desc

select c.id as consultationId, c.consultation_no as consultationNo, c.owner_id as ownerId, c.pet_id as petId, c.doctor_id as doctorId, c.title as title, c.content as content, c.status as status, c.rating as rating, c.rating_comment as ratingComment, c.create_time as consultationCreateTime, cr.id as latestReplyId, cr.reply_content as latestReplyContent, cr.reply_time as latestReplyTime from consultation c left join consultation_reply cr on cr.consultation_id = c.id and cr.id = ( select max(t.id) from consultation_reply t where t.consultation_id = c.id ) order by c.id desc

select id as id, consultation_id as consultationId, reply_content as replyContent, reply_images as replyImages, doctor_id as doctorId, doctor_name as doctorName, is_official as isOfficial, likes as likes, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from consultation_reply where consultation_id = #{consultationId} order by id asc

select id as id, consult_no as consultNo, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, title as title, content as content, images as images, reply_content as replyContent, reply_images as replyImages, reply_status as replyStatus, rating as rating, comment as comment, consult_time as consultTime, reply_time as replyTime, status as status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from consult where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc
